contact.heroDescription: Tell us about your project and let's explore how Pro-Sharp can help you achieve your goals.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project or needs...
form.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

contact.responseTimeDescription: We respond to all inquiries within one business day.

footer.ctaDescription: From engineering to operations to supply — we cover the entire technology lifecycle.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Pro-Sharp Hungary Kft. All rights reserved.

engineering.heroDescription: We don't just write code; we architect resilient, high-load ecosystems that drive global industries. From the Duplex Platform to Applied AI, we transform complex challenges into sustainable digital value.
engineering.duplexDescription: Our flagship enterprise solution — the backbone for international trade data exchange.
engineering.duplexBody: Trade Sync, powered by Duplex Platform, ensures seamless synchronization of product data across the entire supply chain. Active cross-border operations from local SMEs to global giants — proven stability under extreme data loads.
engineering.dataDescription: Data is the engine of every system we build. Our approach to data architecture goes well beyond storage. We design systems that handle serious load, guarantee integrity, and are ready for the technologies of tomorrow.
engineering.data1Desc: MS SQL Server & PostgreSQL systems proven stable with 12 billion+ records. Complex query optimization and high-availability clusters for business-critical processes.
engineering.data2Desc: For workloads that demand flexibility and horizontal scalability, we use MongoDB to handle large volumes of unstructured or semi-structured data at high speed.
engineering.data3Desc: For systems where auditability matters, we implement Event Sourcing to preserve the full transaction history alongside current state. Combined with CQRS, this approach separates read and write operations to achieve extreme scalability.
engineering.data4Desc: We also integrate vector databases such as Qdrant, Milvus, and pgvector to enable semantic search and RAG-based AI applications, keeping your corporate data secure throughout.
engineering.data5Desc: Supabase and hybrid solutions for rapid market entry (MVP) and real-time data synchronization. Cloud-native infrastructure running seamlessly in the background.
engineering.data6Desc: ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana), Grafana and Prometheus for continuous monitoring of data integrity and system performance — proactively identifying bottlenecks.
engineering.craftDescription: Technologies evolve, but clean architecture and maintainable code are timeless. Every codebase we deliver is built to last: modular, well-structured, and designed to adapt as your business and the technology landscape change around it.
engineering.craft1Desc: Strict coding guidelines ensuring system modularity and easy extensibility throughout the full lifecycle.
engineering.craft2Desc: Proven design patterns to manage complexity and prevent technical debt accumulation.
engineering.craft3Desc: Backend mastery across the full stack — C#, Node.js, Next.js, and Python for any use case.
engineering.craft4Desc: Modern frontend with React, Angular, Blazor and TypeScript — performant, accessible, maintainable.
engineering.aiAugSubtitle: AI doesn't replace the engineer — it unleashes their creativity.
engineering.aiAugBody: At Pro-Sharp, AI is a force multiplier for our engineers. We integrate tools like Claude Opus, GitHub Copilot, and Cursor into our development workflows, along with custom LLMs where the project calls for it.
engineering.aiTool1Desc: AI handles repetitive boilerplate code generation, freeing engineers to focus on complex architecture and unique business problems.
engineering.aiTool2Desc: AI-powered proactive code review and unit test generation — covering more edge cases earlier in development.
engineering.aiTool3Desc: Innovative ideas and MVPs are transformed into validated, working code in radically shorter timeframes.
engineering.aiTool4Desc: Every AI-suggested code contribution goes through multi-level human review before it reaches your codebase.
engineering.appliedAiSubtitle: Beyond the hype: Practical AI integration powered by Pro-Sharp Research.
engineering.appliedAiBody: This is where engineering meets research. Leveraging the work of Pro-Sharp Research, we bring cutting-edge AI capabilities directly into your industrial workflows in ways that are practical, secure, and genuinely useful.
engineering.appliedAi1Desc: Secure, private AI models trained on your corporate data.
engineering.appliedAi2Desc: Uncovering hidden patterns in complex datasets — the HubScience approach.
engineering.appliedAi3Desc: Voice-automated workflows and advanced linguistic analysis.
engineering.appliedAi4Desc: Forecasting demand and optimizing resources in Supply Chain management.
engineering.obsBody: Stability is the result of deliberate design, and we build it in from the start. Our observability stack covers every layer of the systems we build and maintain. We cover edge cases early, ship with confidence, and maintain the kind of quality bar that keeps your systems reliable in production.
engineering.obs1Desc: ELK Stack and Grafana for monitoring every system-level event in real-time.
engineering.obs2Desc: New Relic, and Application Insights give us the diagnostic depth to identify bottlenecks before they affect your operations.
engineering.obs3Desc: Software quality is guaranteed through Playwright and Selenium-based automated test suites, combined with continuous code review processes.

relatedServices.title: Related Services
relatedServices.descriptionEngineering: Technology works best when every layer is taken care of. Pro-Sharp goes beyond engineering and connects you with the expertise you need at every stage.
relatedServices.descriptionOperations: Technology works best when every layer is taken care of. Pro-Sharp goes beyond operations and connects you with the expertise you need at every stage.
relatedServices.descriptionSupply: Technology works best when every layer is taken care of. Pro-Sharp goes beyond sourcing and connects you with the expertise you need at every stage.
relatedServices.tagline: Everything connects. That's how Pro-Sharp works.
relatedServices.engineeringDesc: When off-the-shelf software no longer meets your needs. For any custom software development requirement, our Engineering team brings the latest technologies to turn your ideas into reality.
relatedServices.operationsDesc: Once your systems are up and running, our Operations team provides continuous monitoring and maintenance, so you can focus entirely on growing your business.
relatedServices.supplyDesc: From sourcing the right hardware to managing software licenses and maximizing asset value, Pro-Sharp Supply ensures your technology works for your business at every stage.

caseStudies.heroDescription: From global supply chain platforms to AI-powered research tools — see how our engineering delivers measurable business value.
caseStudies.case1Desc: The Duplex Platform is our flagship enterprise solution, serving as the backbone for international trade data exchange. Trade Sync, powered by Duplex, ensures seamless synchronization of product data across the entire supply chain.
caseStudies.case1Detail2: From local SMEs to global giants
caseStudies.case1Detail3: Proven stability under extreme data loads
caseStudies.case1Detail4: Built on trust and global standards
caseStudies.case2Desc: Knowledge Discovery Platform for scientists, managing 100,000+ papers with AI-driven annotation. An intelligent knowledge graph system uncovering hidden patterns in complex scientific datasets.
caseStudies.case3Desc: High-load voting aid platform handling 100,000+ simultaneous users during peak election periods. Running reliably since 2014, proving our ability to deliver under extreme operating conditions.
caseStudies.case4Desc: Complex construction budget planning system streamlining calculation workflows for the industry. Digitizing and automating previously manual, error-prone budget estimation processes.
caseStudies.ctaText: See how we can deliver similar results for your business.

about.heroDescription: We are a team of engineers, researchers, and technology specialists united by one goal: building technology that actually moves businesses forward.
about.sec1Description: Pro-Sharp is a fully integrated technology company spanning three divisions: Supply, Engineering, and Operations. Behind all of it is a shared commitment to quality, innovation, and long-term partnership with every client we work with.
about.card1Desc: Our solutions are informed by academic-level research in AI and Data Science, translated into practical, production-ready technology.
about.card2Desc: From sourcing infrastructure to building software and keeping systems running, we take responsibility for the full technology lifecycle.
about.card3Desc: Every project is driven by senior engineers and specialists who are genuinely invested in the outcome.
about.sec2Description: Our innovation lab drives cutting-edge research in Data Science and AI.
about.research1Desc: Advanced analytics and data-driven decision making across industries.
about.research2Desc: Custom LLM fine-tuning, NLP, and applied AI research.
about.research3Desc: The HubScience approach to intelligent knowledge discovery.
about.research4Desc: Academic papers and research contributions to the scientific community.
about.sec3Description: The bridge between academic innovation and industrial execution.
about.quote: At Pro-Sharp, we don't just follow trends — we shape them. Pro-Sharp Research's academic-level work is translated by our Engineering and Operations teams into stable, industrial-grade business solutions. This internal knowledge transfer ensures our clients maintain a technological edge.
about.sec4Description: Pro-Sharp was built by people who care deeply about technology and even more about the businesses that depend on it. Our leadership team brings together expertise across enterprise software, cloud infrastructure, hardware procurement, and applied AI research.
about.teamIntro: What sets our team apart is the breadth of knowledge that sits under one roof. Our engineers work in close proximity to researchers exploring the frontiers of AI and Data Science, which means the solutions we build for clients are shaped by genuine innovation rather than yesterday's industry standards. At Pro-Sharp, research and practice are two sides of the same coin, and that combination is what drives the work we do every day.
about.sec5Description: Three pillars, one unified technology partner.
about.pillar1Desc: High-performance software engineering — enterprise platforms, AI integration, legacy modernization.
about.pillar2Desc: Stable cloud operations — multi-cloud, DevOps, monitoring, security, NIS2 compliance.
about.pillar3Desc: Smart IT sourcing with engineering expertise — device as a service, software licensing, asset management.
about.tagline: Everything connects. That's how Pro-Sharp works.

operations.heroDescription: We build and oversee infrastructure that doesn't just keep up with your business growth — it actively enables it. From multi-cloud strategy to NIS2 compliance.
operations.cloudSubtitle: Platform-independent expertise across Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud, built around your environment.
operations.cloud1Desc: Pro-Sharp brings deep, hands-on expertise across Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud, as well as complex hybrid and on-premise environments.
operations.cloud2Desc: Migrating existing systems to cloud or private servers without interruptions — zero data loss, zero downtime.
operations.cloud3Desc: Terraform and Ansible-based automation ensuring fast, error-free, and reproducible environment builds that are auditable, and ready to scale.
operations.aiSubtitle: Private, secure AI environments and GPU-optimised computing power, fully under your control.
operations.ai1Desc: Self-hosted AI models (Llama 3, Mistral) where data never leaves your own infrastructure.
operations.ai2Desc: NVIDIA-based GPU server parks designed and scaled for the most demanding models — LLMs, Computer Vision.
operations.ai3Desc: Specialized operational support for stable and efficient serving of AI models in production.
operations.devopsSubtitle: Faster releases, fewer errors, and a development environment where everything just works.
operations.devops1Desc: A well-built development pipeline makes every team faster and every release safer. We implement CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions to accelerate software releases while drastically reducing the risk of human error.
operations.devops2Desc: We design and manage Docker and Kubernetes environments to keep your microservices scalable and resilient as your product grows. Ship with confidence, knowing the infrastructure has your back.
operations.devops3Desc: Our approach to Developer Experience means your engineers spend their time writing great code, because the surrounding infrastructure is stable, well-documented, and simply works.
operations.monitorSubtitle: Full-stack observability that catches issues before they affect your operations.
operations.monitor1Desc: We identify problems before your users ever notice them. Using ELK Stack, Prometheus, and Grafana, we maintain real-time dashboards that give a complete and continuous picture of your system health.
operations.monitor2Desc: Application performance management through New Relic and Application Insights lets us pinpoint bottlenecks right down to the code level, giving your development and operations teams the context they need to act quickly and precisely.
operations.monitor3Desc: Intelligent alerting ensures our engineers are notified the moment something requires attention, keeping response times as short as possible and impact on your business to a minimum.
operations.cyberSubtitle: Continuous protection and EU compliance support, built into your infrastructure from the ground up.
operations.cyber1Desc: We also provide full NIS2 compliance support, covering security audits, technical implementation, and the documentation your organisation needs to demonstrate regulatory readiness. As EU requirements continue to evolve, we help you stay ahead of them rather than scrambling to catch up.
operations.cyber2Desc: Strong security protects your business without getting in its way. Pro-Sharp takes a SecOps approach, combining continuous vulnerability assessments, endpoint protection, and georedundant backup systems into a layered, always-on defence. We build security into your infrastructure from the ground up, so it works in the background while your team works in the foreground.
operations.slaSubtitle: Guaranteed response times and cloud cost optimisation tailored to your business.
operations.sla1Desc: Every business has different expectations when it comes to support and cost control, and our offering reflects that. We provide flexible SLA tiers ranging from standard support through to strict 24/7 guaranteed response times, so you always know exactly what to expect when something needs attention.
operations.sla2Desc: Our FinOps practice keeps a continuous eye on your cloud resource usage, identifying inefficiencies and eliminating waste before it shows up on your invoice. We provide regular reviews and clear reporting so your finance and operations teams always have the visibility they need to plan ahead. You get predictable costs, full transparency, and the confidence that your cloud investment is being put to good use.

home.heroDescription: From sourcing the right infrastructure to building enterprise software and keeping everything running around the clock, Pro-Sharp covers the full technology lifecycle under one roof.
home.sec1Description: From procurement through development to operations — we deliver integrated technology solutions across the full IT lifecycle.
home.engDescription: We design and build high-performance software systems, enterprise architectures, and AI-powered applications tailored to your business.
home.opsSlogan: Stability You Can Trust. Security You Can Feel.
home.opsDescription: We manage, secure, and optimise your infrastructure 24/7, so your team never has to worry about what's running in the background.
home.supDescription: We source, finance, and manage the hardware and software your business runs on, from procurement through to end-of-life.
home.sec2Description: Why businesses trust Pro-Sharp with their technology? We bring together three specialist divisions under one roof, giving businesses a single, accountable partner for every layer of their technology.
home.why1Desc: Supply, Engineering, and Operations work in genuine alignment, so nothing falls through the gaps between teams.
home.why2Desc: Our internal Research division keeps us at the frontier of AI and Data Science, and that knowledge flows directly into every project we deliver.
home.why3Desc: We don't just deliver and disappear. We build systems and relationships that are designed to grow with your business.
home.duplexDescription: The Duplex Platform is our flagship enterprise solution, serving as the backbone for international trade data exchange.
home.duplexStatCompaniesSub: From local SMEs to global giants
home.duplexStatYearsSub: Built on trust and global standards
home.duplexBody: Trade Sync, powered by Duplex Platform, ensures seamless synchronization of product data across the entire supply chain — from manufacturer to point of sale.
home.sec3Description: Deep expertise across the modern technology stack — from data architecture to AI-augmented engineering.
home.tech1Desc: MS SQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Event Sourcing & Vector DBs for AI
home.tech2Desc: Azure, AWS, GCP — Infrastructure as Code with Terraform & Ansible
home.tech3Desc: Custom LLM fine-tuning, Knowledge Graphs, NLP & Predictive Analytics
home.tech4Desc: ELK Stack, Prometheus, Grafana, New Relic — proactive diagnostics
home.sec4Description: We measure our success by the impact we have on the businesses we work with. Every system we build, every infrastructure we manage, and every device we source is backed by the same commitment to quality, reliability, and long-term value.
home.study1Desc: Flagship enterprise solution serving as the backbone for international trade data exchange across 13 countries and 6,500+ companies.
home.study2Desc: Knowledge Discovery Platform for scientists, managing 100,000+ papers with AI-driven annotation.
home.study3Desc: High-load voting aid platform handling 100,000+ simultaneous users during peak election periods since 2014.
home.sec5Description: Pro-Sharp Research bridges academic innovation and industrial execution.
home.researchQuote: At Pro-Sharp, we don't just follow trends — we shape them. Pro-Sharp Research's academic-level work is translated by our Engineering and Operations teams into stable, industrial-grade business solutions. This internal knowledge transfer ensures our clients maintain a technological edge.
home.research1Desc: Secure, private AI models trained on your corporate data
home.research2Desc: Uncovering hidden patterns in complex datasets
home.sec6Body: Pro-Sharp was founded on a simple but powerful idea: that businesses deserve a technology partner who understands the full picture. Our three divisions — Supply, Engineering, and Operations — were built to work together from the ground up. When your infrastructure, software, and operations are managed by the same team with the same standards, the result is a technology environment that's faster to build, easier to maintain, and genuinely aligned with your business goals.

supply.heroDescription: From sourcing the right hardware to managing software licenses and maximizing asset value, Pro-Sharp Supply ensures your technology works for your business at every stage.
supply.sec1Description: Industry-leading hardware from the world's top manufacturers, paired with engineering consultancy and a procurement model designed around your business.
supply.svc1Desc: Your business has unique needs, and your hardware setup should reflect that — we always start from your requirements to find the setup that truly fits.
supply.svc2Desc: Every procurement comes with expert guidance. We assess your workflows, existing infrastructure, and growth plans before making any recommendation.
supply.svc3Desc: Your negotiated company pricing extends to employees for personal purchases — a simple, effective way to strengthen your employer brand.
supply.noLimitsText1: When a partner asked us to build robots, we didn't blink — we sat down at the drawing board. We're not a static catalogue; we're a
supply.noLimitsText2: . From server farms to the smallest IoT device, share your boldest IT challenge and we'll engineer the solution.
supply.sec2Description: From cloud productivity platforms to endpoint protection — the right software stack, managed end-to-end so you only pay for what you actually use.
supply.soft1Desc: From Microsoft, Amazon, and Google cloud platforms to professional endpoint protection like FortiNet, we source and manage the right tools across your entire software environment. Whether you're building from scratch or optimising an existing setup, we'll find the right fit.
supply.soft2Desc: As EU regulations continue to tighten, staying compliant with directives like NIS2 is a growing priority for businesses operating in Hungary. We support your business in meeting these requirements, reducing security risks and avoiding the kind of costly oversights that come with non-compliance.
supply.sec4Description: Don't let capital constraints limit your growth! We believe the best technology should be accessible to everyone — and our financing models are built around that principle.
supply.capex3: Capital tied up in rapidly depreciating assets
supply.opex2: Capital freed for your company's growth
supply.benefit1Desc: Avoid large upfront outlays and keep capital working where it matters most for your business, preserving liquidity and financial flexibility.
supply.benefit2Desc: No unexpected expenses at the end of asset lifecycles or in case of potential malfunctions. Just predictable, fixed monthly fees to plan for.
supply.benefit3Desc: The flexible arrangements mean you can swap out outdated devices with ease, ensuring your team always has access to the most current technology.
supply.benefit4Desc: IT infrastructure consumed as a service (OPEX) can be expensed, providing significant tax savings and optimization opportunities according to Hungarian accounting rules.
supply.bottomLineText: In today's economic environment, shifting from CAPEX to OPEX isn't just an accounting trick — it's a strategic move. At Pro-Sharp, we don't sell one-size-fits-all solutions. Let's sit down and think it through together: whether long-term rental, instalment payments, or a custom Device-as-a-Service arrangement is the best fit for your company. Let's find the financing format that best supports your business growth!
supply.sec5Description: There is no one-size-fits-all structure here. Whether instalment payments, long-term rental makes the most sense for your company's situation, we'll work with you to find the right arrangement.
supply.payment1Desc: With our predictable, scheduled instalment payment plans, even higher-value asset acquisitions can be realized immediately without straining your company's cash flow.
supply.payment2Desc: Premium IT infrastructure with flexible rental terms. You can swap, return, or extend the rental of devices at any time according to your needs.
supply.payment3Desc: Device-as-a-Service (DaaS): Beyond just providing hardware, we take on installation, maintenance, and lifecycle management for a single, predictable monthly fee.
supply.beyondHwText: Our financing extends beyond hardware to cover software licenses and cloud subscription costs as well, transforming annual fees into predictable monthly expenses across your entire IT infrastructure. Our goal is to enable your company to evolve with the most modern technology without straining your budget.
supply.platformsDescription: Purpose-built tools that give you visibility and control across the full asset lifecycle — from procurement to remarketing.
supply.inventoryDesc: If your IT inventory still lives in a spreadsheet, you already know the frustrations that come with it. Pro-Sharp Inventory is a modern, clean asset management platform that tracks warranties, monitors depreciation, and automatically flags upcoming procurement needs before they catch you off guard.
supply.inventoryCta: Join the Pilot Programme — it's free
supply.marketplaceDesc: When a device reaches the end of its useful life in your organisation, its value doesn't have to disappear with it. Through our own marketplace platform, you'll be able to resell retired assets in just a few clicks — whether to your own employees or to other Pro-Sharp partners.
supply.marketplaceFeat1: Resell retired devices in a few clicks
supply.marketplaceFeat2: Sell to employees or Pro-Sharp partners
supply.fullCircleText1: From procurement and day-to-day tracking all the way through to remarketing, Pro-Sharp ensures your assets generate

blog.heroDescription: Research findings, product updates, and the thinking behind how we build.
